texto: Those who suffer great adversity and sorrow and go on to serve their fellowmen develop a great capacity to understand others. Like the prophets, they have acquired a higher understanding of the mind and will of Christ.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a CARLOS H. AMADO: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a superacao. O trecho “Those who suffer great adversity and sorrow and go on to serve their fellowmen develop a great ca…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que superacao, adversity, lds-church pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de lds-church.
